title: Archipelago
description: Explore majestic islands with stunning terrain!
body:
Archipelago turns you minecraft world into a unique archipelago of islands while also making mountains an shores a bit better!

### Showcase
![Ocean and mountains](https://github.com/ly-nxs/grand-canyon/blob/main/Util/2024-12-08_12.24.12.png?raw=true)

### FAQ
- Only effects the terrain and biome placement
- I have not tested anything else for compatibility yet

It started out as me trying to make a river overhaul, but I gave up and got this instead.

Thanks to unnecessarymb for trying to teach me splines, I still don't fully understand them, but I do understand brute force :>
